H.8 Assets and Liabilities of Commercial Banks in the United States

Table 1. Seasonally Adjusted, All Commercial Banks

Seasonally adjusted, millions of dollars
Account Apr. 17, 2025 Apr. 24, 2025 May 1, 2025
Total assets 23,100,000.0 23,150,000.0 23,200,000.0
Securities 5,800,000.0 5,820,000.0 5,840,000.0
Total loans and leases 12,100,000.0 12,120,000.0 12,140,000.0
Commercial and industrial loans 2,800,000.0 2,810,000.0 2,820,000.0
Real estate loans 5,100,000.0 5,110,000.0 5,120,000.0
Consumer loans 1,900,000.0 1,905,000.0 1,910,000.0
Total deposits 17,800,000.0 17,850,000.0 17,900,000.0
Other liabilities 1,200,000.0 1,205,000.0 1,210,000.0
* Seasonally adjusted by the Federal Reserve.
Note: Some data are preliminary and may be revised.

Not seasonally adjusted, millions of dollars
